name: Chat-O-Cord
description: A full stack end to end chat application built with React as the frontend, Express.js as the backend, PostgreSQL as the database, Redis for session cache, Socket.io for real-time communication, Cloudinary for image storage. Last but not the least, it is then built with Electron to make it a desktop application.

name: Starty
description: A centralised reddit like platform to share and find out more startups matching your interests. Build with Next.js v15, TailwindCSS, and Sanity.io for the headless CMS and handling all of the data.

name: MOS 6502 CPU Emulator
description: A software emulation of the MOS Technology 6502 processor — the 8-bit CPU that powered the Apple II, Commodore 64, Atari 2600, and NES. Implements the full register set (A, X, Y, PC, SP), status flags, a 64KB address space, and a complete instruction set including load/store, stack, subroutine, and jump operations. Ships with a custom assembler written from scratch that compiles 6502 assembly to binary, which the emulator can then execute directly.

name: 16 Bit Virtual Machine
description: A very agnostic 16 bit virtual machine with custom assembler to assemble it's own assembly language to run on. This is built with Rust without any 3rd party library. This imitates a virtual machine having 13 16-bit registers and memory space constists of 8-bit memory block layed in little endian mode.

name: RustyKV
description: Rusty KV Store is a lightweight Redis-compatible server that implements Redis commands using Rust's async I/O capabilities with Tokio. This project aims to provide a high-performance, memory-efficient alternative to Redis while maintaining protocol compatibility. It comes with pre-built cli client built with C++

name: Everato
description: Open source solution for in-person and online event organisation and management, in replacement of Konfhub. Single binary setup, download, run, use. Yaml configuration through a single file and a root admin. Fully automatic ticketing system via email notification and qr scanning via admin dashboard for onboarding.

name: Video to MP3 Converter — Microservices on Kubernetes
description: A production-ready event-driven microservices system that converts MP4 videos to MP3 audio asynchronously. Built with four independent Python/Flask services — Gateway, Auth, Converter, and Notification — communicating via RabbitMQ. Videos are stored in MongoDB GridFS, conversion is handled by FFmpeg, and users receive a download link via email once processing completes. Fully containerised with Docker and deployed on a Kubernetes cluster with Minikube, complete with K8s manifests, ingress, and horizontal scaling support.

name: CI CD Pipeline to deploy on GCP (Docker Swarm)
description: This project includes a python application to monitor server health which stores last 5 logs into redis cache which is replicated and deployed on 2 node docker swarm cluster on GCP

name: gRPC Server for Order Service in C++
description: A simple gRPC server made with the power of C++ and google's protocol buffers.

name: Inside Out Tea
description: Collaboration on a Tea Business Startup that offers a unique tea selection based on individual moods. Whether you're feeling stressed, happy, or adventurous, our platform helps you find the perfect tea flavor to match your mood
